name: Akane Kashiwazaki

He is most notably known for having copious amounts of manga in his room and being the slowest runner in the group with the most unique running style. Prince currently stays in room 204 in Chikuseisou. Prince is rather inactive and occasionally speaks in dramatized speech. name: Kaguya-hime
description: Kaguya is the main protagonist in folktale, The Tale of Princess Kaguya. She has been given the title "Princess" after her adoptive father, Miyatsuku, found golden nuggets as a sign from the gods telling him that Kaguya has to live a noble life and therefore bought the title.

However, she decided to leave the group after a controversy and embarked on a journey to discover her true calling. name: Kazuhiko Nukumizu
description: Kazuhiko is a student in Class 1-C at Tsuwabuki High School and the president of the Literature Club. He is fairly intelligent and quite experienced in handling girls' issues due to taking care of his little sister. He also has a terrible sense of style, much to the chagrin of his more popular and fashionable friend, [Anna Yanami](https://anilist.co/character/230873/Anna-Yanami).

name: Kazuki Hoshino
description: A completely ordinary high school student who loves idle chatter with his friends and Umaibōs, a Japanese snack. One day, he somehow suddenly antagonizes Aya Otonashi — even though he has never met her before. She threatens to “break” him.

name: Rifa
description: The Able consort, residing in the Crystal Palace within the inner court. The second most favoured consort of the Emperor, said to be so in big part due to her voluptuous chest. She gave birth to a boy who succumbed for unknown reasons and she herself is in grave health condition at the start of the story.

name: Yo Go
description: Height: 193 cm (6'4") The manager of Cafe Goyo who is deaf. Despite having a wonderful voice, he rarely speaks. He is horrible at making coffee, but he is a great cook and gardener. In the English localization, his name was changed to Yohan.

description: Zenigata has made it his mission in life to arrest Lupin. He would love to arrest the other members of Lupin's gang, but Zenigata is really after the mastermind himself. name: Ayaka Kagari
description: The female protagonist of the series. She is known as "Princess" by many female students due to her intelligence and high grades, which makes her the most popular girl at Tougetsu Academy. Ayaka is Kazane Kagari’s foster daughter, the chairwoman of the school who also happens to be head of "Workshop Witches."

name: Kiriha
description: Kiriha is a tsukumogami of a double-woven obi of pure silk. In her human form, Kiriha appears as a young girl with long light blue hair. She has light skin, red eyes, and pointed ears. She retains the same scent of Sakura that was always present on her as an obi as well. Kiriha is a straightforward and eccentric tsukumogami with a very unusual personality. name: Nobunaga Hazama
description: Like one of the ronin warriors in Edo period Japan, Nobunaga comes complete with a long Japanese sword that he uses with great finesse and skill. His best friend is Uvogin, and the two bring out the best in each other during combat.
